The thesis hinges on whether GenAI is a permanent margin compressor for outsourced engineering or a transient overhang — at this price the asymmetry favors buyers, but the 18% short interest signals the market is not yet convinced.

The Federal/consulting cycle risk is real but increasingly priced in, and ACN is the cleanest AI-tailwind name in IT services. Quality compounder at a value price.

Watchlist until evidence Firefly is monetizing or the multiple compresses further to fully price the AI risk.
